title: Add background jobs (&, fg, bg, jobs) test coverage
description: Background job support is implemented in src/index.ts (isBackground, jobs_cmd, fg, bg) but has zero test coverage. Add comprehensive tests for: 1) trailing & spawns background job and returns job ID, 2) jobs command lists running/completed jobs, 3) fg brings background job to foreground and returns output, 4) fg with %N syntax, 5) bg validates job exists, 6) job cleanup after fg. Acceptance: ≥6 test cases covering all background job code paths.
